sources.description: Source-of-truth decisions and access notes. Real data normally stays in the runtime or external source.

internal_state.description: Life OS operational state such as last checks, suppression windows, priority scores, and routine pointers.

caches.description: Dated or named caches/result snapshots used by Life OS routines. Persistent by default; may contain non-secret text when useful.

semantic_setup.description: Semantic install decisions, pending setup questions, and health-check status. Answers are private runtime/config pointers, not public repo data.
